summary: M489 — 12 sprite regens via SpriteCook (feet-cut-off fixes). Used each character's east_attack frame as the SpriteCook reference; regenerated paladin_female/rogue_male/oracle_old/tinker/tinker_female/marek_greel east_block, swashbuckler_female/tactician_female south, monk/mira_seer east, tinker_female east_spell and east_ko. Pending review on staging — not yet pushed to emberveil.radgh.com.
